findings.summary: renderPolicyReasoning uses a hardcoded REASON_PRECEDENCE map instead of the ruleset.reasonOrder configuration, breaking data-driven policy rules.
findings.suggested_fix: Add `reasonOrder: Readonly<Record<string, number>>` to `renderPolicyReasoning` input, remove the hardcoded `REASON_PRECEDENCE` map, and pass `ruleset.reasonOrder` from `synthesizePolicyInsight.ts`.

findings.summary: boundedIdentifiers array in synthesizePolicyInsight only includes deterministic feature candidate IDs, dropping contextual evidence and research brief candidate IDs.
findings.suggested_fix: Collect candidate IDs from `envelope.evidence.selected.contextualEvidence` claims and `researchBrief` into `boundedIdentifiers` before passing to `renderPolicyReasoning`.
